articles.author: Anthony Robledo
articles.title: Grammy winner slams Clive Davis after his death - USA Today
articles.description: Following Clive Davis' death, singer India.Arie wrote "Mark my words. Watch what kind of archival interviews are about to come out."
articles.content:
India Arie Simpson, who performs as India.Arie, is condemning Clive Davis' impact on the music industry after the record mogul died on June 22 at age 94.
In a June 23, Threads post, the "Video" sing… [+2615 chars]
